summary: Iteration 8 regression testing complete after major code quality refactoring. All 28 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified: Landing→Problems→Chat with voice selection (both Miron and Oksana), message sending with AI response, back navigation, tariff page (4 cards), auth page (login/register forms). ChatPage.jsx successfully split from 463 lines to 219 lines + 6 sub-components + 2 hooks.
critical_code_review_comments: ChatPage.jsx successfully reduced from 463 to 219 lines - good separation of concerns
6 sub-components created: ChatHeader (64 lines), VoiceSelector (23 lines), MessageList (49 lines), ChatInputArea (66 lines), ImagePreview (23 lines), ImagePickerModal (30 lines)
2 new hooks extracted: useSpeechRecognition (77 lines), useImageUpload (68 lines)
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
Backend helper functions properly extracted: find_problem_context, load_personal_context, extract_user_name, call_openrouter
No lint errors in refactored code
seed_data_creation: Admin user seeded automatically on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 verified code quality refactoring: (1) ChatPage.jsx split into 6 sub-components (ChatHeader, VoiceSelector, MessageList, ChatInputArea, ImagePreview, ImagePickerModal), (2) 2 new hooks extracted (useSpeechRecognition, useImageUpload), (3) Backend helper functions extracted (find_problem_context, load_personal_context, extract_user_name, call_openrouter), (4) All data-testids preserved, (5) No lint errors. All 28 backend tests pass. Frontend flows: Landing→Problems→Chat with voice selection (Miron/Oksana), message send/receive, back navigation, tariff page (4 cards), auth page all working.
